CustomField.description:
If a duplicate is found (by email, phone or external ID), a "Full Candidate Update" will override any existing information on the record and any Skills and Employment History which has been parsed & linked to the record.
THE DEFAULT VALUE IS "FALSE"
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If a duplicate is found (by email, phone or external ID), a "Full Candidate Update" will override any existing information on the record and any Skills and Employment History which has been parsed & linked to the record.
CustomField.label: Full Candidate Update
